message:
fix(sql): add typed table support to executor and fix memory leaks

- Fix segfault when querying Parquet/Arrow/etc files via CLI
  - Add typed table handling to getPhysicalColumnIndex()
  - Add typed table handling to buildSchemaTypeMap() with mapParquetType()
  - Add typed table column readers: readInt64ColumnTyped(), etc.

- Fix memory leak in getColumnNames() for Lance tables
  - Add ColumnNamesResult struct with ownership tracking
  - Update callers to use getColumnNamesWithOwnership() with defer deinit()

- Update benchmark.zig to use AnyTable for multi-format support

- Remove stale "compilation can be disabled" test (interpreter removed)
